summary: Action-packed, explosive countdown timer component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/countdown-blast/src/CountdownBlast.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `CountdownBlast` and `countdownBlastDefaultProps`, then register the `CountdownBlast` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Countdown Blast Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/countdown-blast to my project. Preserve the exported CountdownBlastProps API and register the CountdownBlast composition with the default props.
